healthy_indicators: All three tabs present in HTML (tab-content-fulltime, tab-content-fractional, tab-content-sources)
Date in page matches today or yesterday (daily agent may not have run yet)
No unreplaced placeholder tokens (TODAY_DATE, APPLY_URL, etc.)
Only 1 commit per 24h window (no duplicate commits)
monitoring_note: Live URL fetch is blocked by the Anthropic egress proxy in the remote execution environment. Use GitHub Pages API (status=built) as the primary availability indicator. Verify HTML health from repo source via GitHub Contents API.

known_fixable_issues.pattern: Unreplaced placeholder token found (TODAY_DATE, GENERATION_TIME, etc.)
known_fixable_issues.fix: The daily agent failed to replace placeholders — remove the broken index.html and restore the most recent archive copy

known_fixable_issues.pattern: HTML size < 10000 bytes (page is nearly empty)
known_fixable_issues.fix: Restore from most recent archive: fetch archive/YYYY-MM-DD.html and write it back to index.html

known_fixable_issues.pattern: GitHub Pages API returns status != built
known_fixable_issues.fix: Cannot fix from agent — file issue for manual investigation

known_fixable_issues.pattern: Multiple duplicate commits within same minute (daily agent retry loop)
known_fixable_issues.fix: Cannot fix from agent — file WARNING issue for investigation of daily agent concurrency
